name: tool-node-mcp-config-contract-fix
title: 修复 TOOL 节点 MCP 工具配置字段不一致导致调用失败
description: 修复工作流 TOOL 节点前端保存 selectedTool.fullName、后端执行器读取 mcpToolName 导致 MCP 工具名为空并触发节点调用失败的问题。
creator: zj669
notes: Fixed TOOL node MCP config contract: backend now resolves mcpToolName with selectedTool.fullName fallback and emits tool_response; frontend now persists mcpToolName when selecting/clearing tools. Verified with npm test -- --run src/modules/workflow/components/__tests__/NodeConfigTabs.test.tsx, npm run typecheck, mvn -pl ai-agent-infrastructure -am -Dtest=ToolNodeExecutorStrategyTest -Dsurefire.failIfNoSpecifiedTests=false test, and mvn -pl ai-agent-infrastructure -am test -Dsurefire.failIfNoSpecifiedTests=false.
